compatibility.notes: uses pinned-repo custom function(s) ['tls_multisplit_sni'] (NOT shipped on the OpenWrt port runtime; defined in the pinned repo's lua/custom_funcs.lua or lua/zapret-multishake.lua); blob(s) ['stun_pat'] require bin assets not shipped by the port. The chain will not execute on the port runtime until the defining lua and bin assets are shipped. DEFAULT_BLOCKED_PASS_DOMAINS blocks strategy=1 for discord.com so the live Discord path is strategy=2 (Default v5); the static discord-v5.opt is the loadable fallback.

required_assets.role: provides blob 'stun_pat' (NOT shipped by the port)
defines custom desync functions (NOT shipped by the port)
discord ipset target

warnings: seqovl=652: may cancel on a short SNI when seqovl >= pos[1]-1 (spec §5.2); degrades to seqovl=0 or no-ops for small-SNI domains

VOLUNTARY_CUTOFF_MAKES_LATER_STEPS_UNREACHABLE: chain contains `send` not as the last step; `send` calls direction_cutoff_opposite (zapret-antidpi.lua:91) so later steps are cutoff (unreachable) inside circular plan_instance_execute; works as STATIC only
SEQOVL_MAY_CANCEL_ON_SHORT_SNI: seqovl=652 >= 122 (discord.com SNI ~122 bytes); seqovl >= pos-1 cancels (proven: Default old seqovl=652 failed with 'seqovl cancelled, too large')

static_fallback_profile.description: Static native nfqws2 profile (no circular_quality, no learning) -- the proven manual fallback. NOT the Orchestra implementation.
